sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n108933" key="u(pope/tomai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑποπέτομαι</orth>, <sense id="n108933.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fly under,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0525.tlg001.perseus-grc1:4:18:5" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paus.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.18.5</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
